candidate_blockers.detail: This artifact completes one-sided pressure only.
Rows reuse one flow snapshot and do not advance coupled FSI.
No coupled or Fluent comparison run is part of this artifact.

rows.scope_limit: shared snapshot sampling-only per-face one-sided pressure diagnostic on archived shared preflow velocity/pressure/obstacle fields; does not advance coupled FSI and does not claim Fluent parity.
